words.definitionEn: written text for a film, play, or computer program
words.definitionTh: บท / สคริปต์
words.example: The developer reviewed the script.

words.definitionEn: art made by shaping stone, metal, or other material
words.definitionTh: ประติมากรรม
words.example: The museum displayed a stone sculpture.

words.definitionEn: a large area of salt water
words.example: The river flows into the sea.

words.definitionEn: to look for something
words.definitionTh: ค้นหา / การค้นหา
words.example: Search the database for the record.

words.definitionEn: one of the main periods of the year
words.example: Demand changes by season.

words.definitionEn: a place to sit
words.definitionTh: ที่นั่ง / นั่ง
words.example: Please take a seat.

words.definitionEn: number two in order or a unit of time
words.definitionTh: ที่สอง / วินาที
words.example: The second test passed.

words.definitionEn: used to introduce a second point
words.definitionTh: ประการที่สอง
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “secondly” correctly.

words.definitionEn: information kept unknown from others
words.example: Keep the password secret.

words.definitionEn: a person who handles administrative work
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “secretary” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a distinct part of something
words.example: Read the safety section.

words.definitionEn: a particular area of business or society
words.example: The food sector uses strict standards.

words.definitionEn: safe from danger or firmly fixed
words.definitionTh: ปลอดภัย / ทำให้แน่นหนา
words.example: Secure the guard before starting.

words.definitionEn: protection from danger or unauthorized access
words.definitionTh: ความปลอดภัย
words.example: The system has strong security.

words.definitionEn: to notice with the eyes
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “see” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the part of a plant from which a new plant grows
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seed” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to try to find or obtain
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seek” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to appear to be
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seem” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to choose from alternatives
words.example: Select the correct product.

words.definitionEn: the act of choosing
words.example: The supplier selection is complete.

words.definitionEn: a person’s own identity
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “self” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to exchange goods for money
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sell” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to cause something to go to another person or place
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “send” correctly.

words.definitionEn: older or higher in rank
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “senior” correctly.

words.definitionEn: an ability to feel or understand
words.definitionTh: ประสาทสัมผัส / ความรู้สึก
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sense” correctly.

words.definitionEn: easily affected by small changes
words.example: The camera is sensitive to light.

words.definitionEn: a group of words expressing a complete thought
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sentence” correctly.

words.definitionEn: not together or to divide
words.definitionTh: แยก / แยกกัน
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “separate” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the ninth month of the year
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “September” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a particular order of related things
words.example: Follow the correct sequence.

words.definitionEn: a group of connected things
words.example: The team ran a series of tests.

words.definitionEn: important and needing careful thought
words.example: This is a serious safety risk.

words.definitionEn: in an important or sincere way
words.definitionTh: อย่างจริงจัง
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seriously” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a person employed to perform household duties
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “servant” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to provide something useful
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “serve” correctly.

words.definitionEn: help or work provided for someone
words.example: The camera requires regular service.

words.definitionEn: a period devoted to an activity
words.example: The training session starts at nine.

words.definitionEn: to put or establish; a group of matching things
words.example: Set the pressure limit.

words.definitionEn: the position or conditions in which something operates
words.definitionTh: การตั้งค่า
words.example: Check the camera setting.

words.definitionEn: to solve an issue or begin living somewhere
words.definitionTh: จัดการ / ตั้งถิ่นฐาน
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “settle” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the number 7
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seven” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the number 17
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seventeen” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the number 70
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “seventy” correctly.

words.definitionEn: more than two but not many
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “several” correctly.

words.definitionEn: very serious or extreme
words.example: The line suffered severe damage.

words.definitionEn: the biological category of male or female
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sex” correctly.

words.definitionEn: relating to sex
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับเพศ
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sexual” correctly.

words.definitionEn: an area protected from direct light
words.example: Store the product in the shade.

words.definitionEn: a dark shape made when light is blocked
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shadow” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to move quickly backward and forward
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shake” correctly.

words.definitionEn: used to express future action or determination
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shall” correctly.

words.definitionEn: not deep
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shallow” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a painful feeling caused by embarrassment or wrongdoing
words.definitionTh: ความอับอาย
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shame” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the physical form of something
words.definitionTh: รูปร่าง / ทำให้เป็นรูป
words.example: The camera checks the product shape.

words.definitionEn: to use or give something jointly
words.definitionTh: แบ่งปัน / หุ้น
words.example: Share the results with the team.

words.definitionEn: having a fine cutting edge
words.example: The blade is very sharp.

words.definitionEn: used to refer to a female person
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “she” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a farm animal with wool
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sheep” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a large thin flat piece of material
words.example: Record the result on the sheet.

words.definitionEn: a flat board used for storing objects
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shelf” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a hard outer covering
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shell” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a place giving protection
words.example: The workers moved to a shelter.

words.definitionEn: a work period or a change in position
words.definitionTh: กะ / เปลี่ยน
words.example: The night shift starts at ten.

words.definitionEn: to produce or reflect light
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shine” correctly.

words.definitionEn: bright and reflecting light
words.definitionTh: เป็นประกาย
words.example: The surface is smooth and shiny.

words.definitionEn: a large boat or to transport goods
words.definitionTh: เรือ / ส่งสินค้า
words.example: The supplier will ship the parts.

words.definitionEn: a garment worn on the upper body
words.definitionTh: เสื้อเชิ้ต
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shirt” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a sudden upsetting event or impact
words.definitionTh: ตกใจ / แรงกระแทก
words.example: The event caused a shock.

words.definitionEn: feeling surprised and upset
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shocked” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a covering worn on the foot
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shoe” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to fire, take a photograph, or film
words.definitionTh: ยิง / ถ่ายภาพ
words.example: The camera can shoot video.

words.definitionEn: the act of firing or filming
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shooting” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a place selling goods or to buy goods
words.definitionTh: ร้านค้า / ซื้อของ
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shop” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the activity of buying goods
words.definitionTh: การซื้อของ
words.example: Online shopping is convenient.

words.definitionEn: small in length or duration
words.example: Keep the cable short.

words.definitionEn: an act of firing or a photograph
words.definitionTh: การยิง / ภาพถ่าย
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shot” correctly.

words.definitionEn: used to express expected or recommended action
words.example: You should check the pressure.

words.definitionEn: the body joint connecting the arm and body
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shoulder” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to speak very loudly
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shout” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to make visible or demonstrate
words.definitionTh: แสดง / การแสดง
words.example: The chart shows the trend.

words.definitionEn: a device or act of washing with sprayed water
words.definitionTh: ฝักบัว / อาบน้ำ
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “shower” correctly.

words.definitionEn: to close completely
words.example: Shut the valve immediately.

words.definitionEn: not healthy
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sick” correctly.

words.definitionEn: one surface or direction of something
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “side” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the ability to see or something seen
words.definitionTh: การมองเห็น
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sight” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a notice, gesture, or written signature
words.definitionTh: ป้าย / ลงนาม
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “sign” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a sound, light, or action carrying information
words.example: The sensor sends a signal.

words.definitionEn: important enough to have an effect
words.example: The change produced a significant improvement.

words.definitionEn: to an important or measurable degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างมีนัยสำคัญ
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “significantly” correctly.

words.definitionEn: the absence of sound
words.example: The room fell into silence.

words.definitionEn: making no sound
words.example: The alarm remained silent.

words.definitionEn: a fine soft material produced by silkworms
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “silk” correctly.

words.definitionEn: showing poor judgment
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “silly” correctly.

words.definitionEn: a shiny grey-white metal or colour
words.definitionTh: สีเงิน / เงิน
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “silver” correctly.

words.definitionEn: almost the same
words.example: The two defects are similar.

words.definitionEn: the state of being alike
words.definitionTh: ความคล้ายคลึง
words.example: The samples show a clear similarity.

words.definitionEn: in the same way
words.definitionTh: ในทำนองเดียวกัน
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “similarly” correctly.

words.definitionEn: easy to understand or do
words.example: Use a simple method.

words.definitionEn: in an easy or direct way
words.example: This lesson shows how to use “simply” correctly.

words.definitionEn: from a time in the past until now or because
words.definitionTh: ตั้งแต่ / เนื่องจาก
words.example: The line has improved since Monday.
